seo.title: Websolixs — Next-Gen Software House
seo.description: We craft scalable web & mobile applications, bespoke digital products, and immersive experiences. Your vision, engineered to perfection.

hero.title: We Engineer
hero.subtitle: From bold ideas to production-ready systems — we craft scalable web applications, immersive mobile experiences, and custom digital products that move at the speed of your ambition.

services.heading: What We Build
services.subheading: End-to-end engineering across the full digital stack — from pixel-perfect interfaces to cloud-native backends.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Performant, scalable web apps built on modern stacks. We ship React, Next.js, and Node.js solutions that load fast and scale effortlessly.

items.title: Mobile Applications
items.description: Cross-platform mobile apps that feel truly native. From fintech to e-commerce, we build experiences users love.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Human-centered design systems and interactive prototypes. Every pixel has purpose — every interaction tells a story.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: Robust cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and containerized deployments that keep your product always available.

items.title: E-Commerce Solutions
items.description: High-converting storefronts and custom commerce platforms. We turn browsers into buyers with data-driven UX.

items.title: AI Integration
items.description: Embed intelligence into your products. From LLM-powered features to custom ML pipelines, we make your software smarter.

projects.heading: Selected Work

items.title: PulseHealth

about.heading:
Built by engineers,
driven by craft.
about.body: Founded in 2021, Websolixs started with a simple belief: great software should be beautiful, fast, and built to last. Today, we are a team of 25+ engineers, designers, and strategists obsessed with pushing the boundary of what's possible on the web and beyond. We don't just write code — we architect experiences, engineer scale, and obsess over the details that make users fall in love with products.
highlights: Full IP ownership transferred to clients

testimonials.heading: What Clients Say
testimonials.subheading: Don't take our word for it.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.quote: Websolixs delivered a fintech platform that exceeded every expectation. Their engineering discipline and attention to security is unmatched. Best investment we've made.

items.name: Mikael Strand
items.quote: The team took our rough concept and shipped a polished SaaS product in 3 months. Communication was exceptional throughout. Highly recommend.

items.name: Amara Osei
items.quote: They rebuilt our entire e-commerce platform from scratch. Page load dropped from 8s to under 1s. Sales went up 40% the following quarter.
